title: Profile size limits: enforce max keys and value length client-side
description: Before broadcasting a Profile message, enforce: max 32 keys, key max 32 bytes (lowercase alphanumeric + underscore only), value max 256 bytes, total serialized size max 4 KB. Return a user-visible error if limits are exceeded. These are enforced client-side only — the relay is blind to profile content and does not validate.
